Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course 'Practicum of Clinical Psychology' is fundamentally about training professionals to 'promote mental health and well-being' (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university practicum, this course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and 'Professional knowledge of psychology' for employment (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students with professional skills for employment as 'clinical psychologists', contributing to decent work and youth training (Targets 8.5, 8.6).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's core competency of 'Multiculturalism' (多元文化關懷) and its aim of 'serving the public' supports the social inclusion of all, aligning with Target 10.2.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: A tangential link exists through 'professional ethics discussion,' which relates to building accountable professional practices, a minor aspect of Target 16.6 (effective, accountable institutions).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course structure requires partnership between the university and 'clinical psychology-related institutions' for the practicum, aligning with Target 17.17 on promoting partnerships.
